text: Fabric Login shall only be performed in Class 1, 2, or 3.

evidence_refs.quote: Fabric Login shall only be performed in Class 1, 2, or 3. Since the Fabric may not support all three

text: Because the Fabric may not support all three classes, the FLOGI Sequence may require retry in a different Class with the appropriate SOF.

evidence_refs.quote: Fabric Login shall only be performed in Class 1, 2, or 3. Since the Fabric may not support all three
classes, the FLOGI Sequence may require retry in a different Class with the appropriate SOF.

text: Fabric Login is valid for all supported classes as indicated by the validity bits in the FLOGI LS_ACC Reply Sequence.

Reply Sequence.
